executive_summary: Business survived the full 2016-2025 window including the 2021-22 crisis. Net margin £1,243,337 (6.6% of revenue -- above 2-5% benchmark). Hedging cost £4,042,149 vs going naked (85% mandate price). 467 bill shock events (112 in crisis years); 17/18 retention offers accepted.
